blocks.body: Generic reference is a way of talking about a whole class / category of objects or persons. In English, you can use: the + adjective (the rich), a/an + singular (a tiger), or Ø + plural (people), depending on the context.

{ "title": "10. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "The + adjective = all people with this feature: the rich, the poor, the young (plural verb!).", "The + nationality (-ese, -sh, -ch) = all representatives of the nation: the Chinese, the British, the French. singular = the whole form in a very formal style (rare): The computer has changed our lives.", "A/An + однина = весь вид у формальному стилі: A tiger is dangerous.", "Ø + множина = весь вид, найпоширеніший варіант: Tigers are dangerous, People need love.", "The + однина = весь вид у дуже формальному стилі (рідко): The computer has changed our lives.", "In general statements do not use the before the plural: Tigers (not the tigers).", "The rich are (plural verb), not is!", "Ukrainians, Germans, Italians — без the (Ukrainians, not the Ukrainians)." ] }
